Overview of the Company: An American multinational automotive and clean energy company focused on AI, electric cars, solar, home batteries, and integrated renewable energy solutions.
Lifestyle and wellness benefits: Financial well-being benefit including affordable loans via Salary Finance.
Focus Sectors / Industries: Automotive, Clean Energy, Artificial Intelligence, Robotics
Services / Offerings / Products: Electric vehicles, solar energy solutions, home battery storage, Tesla Superchargers, Destination Chargers, Optimus humanoid robots, AI5 chips
Innovation Roadmap: Plans for mass production of Optimus 3 at Fremont and Giga Texas by summer 2026; development of AI5 chip for Optimus and supercomputer clusters.
Competitive Advantages: FSD-derived AI for robotics, integrated renewable energy ecosystem, proprietary AI chip development (AI5)
Work culture: Employees report mixed experiences; some appreciate financial benefits, while others cite concerns regarding unpredictable income due to shift cuts, repairs, or unexpected shut-downs.
Mission: Accelerating the world’s transition to sustainable abundance.
AI/ML Adoption Level: High; utilizing FSD-derived AI for robotics and automation
Key Competitors: Automotive and clean energy industry competitors
Interesting Facts: Named in tribute to inventor Nikola Tesla; developing the Optimus bi-pedal autonomous humanoid robot.
Recent News: Released financial results for Q4 and full year 2025 on January 28, 2026; planning mass production of Optimus 3 at Fremont and Giga Texas by summer 2026.
